title: Database Migration
description: Request for migrating a database. No additional details provided.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Database Migration (DEM-2026-0093)

Executive Summary:
This project involves migrating the existing database to a new environment to improve system performance and reliability. The migration is essential to support ongoing infrastructure needs and future scalability.

Business Value/Impact:
Successful migration will enhance data accessibility, reduce downtime, and improve overall operational efficiency. It will also enable better support for business processes dependent on database performance.

Risk Mitigation:
Given the medium risk level, careful planning and comprehensive testing will be conducted to ensure data integrity and minimize service disruption during the migration. Contingency plans will be established to address potential issues swiftly.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 41% overall available capacity.
Constraint: QA Engineer has only 0 units available (requires 10).
Constraint: Security Engineer has only 0 units available (requires 5).
Skill gap: Required skills Database Migration, SQL, Data Modeling, Backup and Recovery are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-12.
